title: Wilted Russian Cabbage Borscht
description: A hearty, creamy, and slightly sweet beet-based stew featuring Chinese cabbage, perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Trim the Chinese cabbage into 1-inch pieces and set aside.
Peel and dice the beets, then add them to a blender or food processor.
Blend the beets for about 30 seconds, or until they break down and turn into a smooth paste.
Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook for 5 minutes, or until it softens.
Add the minced garlic and saut7 for another minute.
Add the blended beets, Chinese cabbage, veggie broth, and apple cider vinegar to the saucepan.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 15 minutes.
Season with salt to taste, and stir in the infused oil.
Serve the Borscht hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
